mapper.select: /* 1. ID: getCarbonData 2. 업무명: 소고 메인 3. 업무설명: 실적조회 */ select (select count(*) from CRBN_MBR_INFO where party_cd = #{partyCd}) as member_cnt, (select count(*) from CRBN_STORE_INFO where party_cd = #{partyCd}) as store_cnt, (select count(*) from CRBN_QR_USE_HST h, CRBN_MBR_INFO m where h.mbr_id = m.mbr_id and m.party_cd = #{partyCd}) as use_cnt
